Home/Counties/Marion County FHA Loans
Marion County FHA Loans

FHA loans in Marion County, Florida

FHA loans across Marion County with as little as 3.5% down. Here's the county's 2026 FHA loan limit, why Ocala and horse country suit FHA buyers, and how to get pre-approved.

Marion County Home Loans

FHA loans in Marion County, Florida

Marion County is the heart of Florida's horse country, centered on Ocala. It's one of the state's most affordable markets, drawing first-time buyers, families, and a growing number of retirees with its low prices, larger lots, and relaxed pace. The FHA loan limit covers homes here with plenty of room to spare, so 3.5% down goes a long way in Marion County.

Marion County FHA limit (1-unit)$541,287

2026 single-family

Minimum down3.5%

With a 580+ score

Min credit score580

500–579 with 10% down

Property types1–4 units

Owner-occupied

What the FHA limit means in Marion County

With the 2026 FHA floor of $541,287 and FHA's 3.5% minimum down, you can finance a Marion County home priced up to roughly $560,000 (your loan covers the price minus your down payment). In Marion's very affordable market, that covers virtually all homes for sale. A handful of Florida counties are set higher, so we confirm Marion County's exact figure with HUD.

Affordable horse-country homeownership with FHA

Ocala and the surrounding communities offer some of the best home values in Florida, well within FHA's loan limit — ideal for first-time buyers and those on a budget. New-construction communities are plentiful and pass the FHA appraisal easily, while older homes that need updates can use an FHA 203(k) renovation loan. Pair FHA with Florida assistance to lower your upfront cost.

Communities We Serve

FHA loans across Marion County

We help FHA buyers throughout Marion County, including Ocala, Belleview, Dunnellon, and the surrounding communities. Wherever you are in the county, we will explain your FHA loan limit, rate, and monthly payment, and get you pre-approved fast. Start with our first-time buyer guide or estimate your payment with the FHA calculator.

Down payment help in Marion County

You don't have to cover the down payment alone. FHA allows gift funds, sellers can contribute up to 6% toward closing costs, and Marion County buyers can often pair FHA with assistance from the Florida Housing Finance Corporation and Marion County's local SHIP-funded programs. Funding and eligibility change frequently, so we'll help you confirm what's currently available — see our FHA down payment assistance guide.

Questions & Answers

Frequently asked questions

What is the FHA loan limit in Marion County for 2026?+
Marion County is at the 2026 Florida FHA floor of $541,287, which covers virtually all homes in the county. Confirm the exact figure with HUD's official lookup.
Is Marion County good for FHA buyers?+
Yes — it's one of Florida's most affordable markets, so FHA's loan limit stretches far in Ocala and the surrounding area.
How much home can I buy with FHA in Marion County?+
With the $541,287 limit and 3.5% down, you can finance a home up to roughly $560,000 — far above the typical Marion County price.
How much down payment do I need in Marion County?+
As little as 3.5% with a 580+ score, reduced with gift funds and Florida assistance.
Do you serve all of Marion County?+
Yes — Ocala, Belleview, Dunnellon, and every community in the county.
